deleteApplicationDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this application? This action cannot be undone.

adminAuditLogDescription: Log of all changes within the platform

noSsoProvidersConfigured: No SSO providers configured yet. Click "Add Provider" to get started.

validationMustBeValidEmailAddress: Must be a valid email address
managedProfileReadOnlyDescription: Your profile is managed by your identity provider and cannot be edited here.
passwordManagementUnavailableForSso: Password management is not available for SSO accounts.
validationNewPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 12 characters
validationNewPasswordMaxLength: New password must be at most 128 characters

validationAgentNameMaxLength: Name must be at most 128 characters
addApplicationDescription: Add a new application to monitor and manage.
noFilesFoundInBranch: No files found in this branch.
editNotificationDescription: Update notification delivery settings and assigned applications.
notificationEnabledDescription: Send notifications when events are emitted.
enableByDefaultDescription: Apply this notification automatically to new applications.
validationApplicationNameMaxLength: Name must be at most 128 characters
validationBranchMaxLength: Branch must be at most 256 characters
validationPathMaxLength: Path must be at most 512 characters
validationNotificationNameMaxLength: Name must be at most 128 characters
validationNotificationWebhookUrlInvalid: Webhook URL must be a valid Discord webhook URL
validationNotificationAvatarUrlInvalid: Avatar URL must be a valid URL
validationNotificationThreadIdInvalid: Thread ID must contain only digits
validationNotificationGotifyServerUrlInv: Server URL must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL
validationNotificationGotifyAppTokenInva: App token must be 15 characters, start with A, and contain only letters, numbers, dots, dashes, or underscores
validationNotificationGotifyPriorityInva: Priority must be a whole number between -2 and 10
notificationSlackAppSettingsNote: The bot name and icon can be configured in your Slack app settings at api.slack.com.
validationNotificationSlackWebhookUrlInv: Webhook URL must be a valid Slack webhook URL
notificationEmailUseTLSDescription: Use encrypted SMTP transport when sending email.
validationNotificationEmailSMTPHostInval: SMTP host must be a hostname or IP address
validationNotificationEmailSMTPPortInval: SMTP port must be a whole number between 1 and 65535
validationNotificationEmailUsernameRequi: Username is required when password is set
validationNotificationEmailToAddressesRe: At least one recipient is required
validationNotificationEmailToAddressesIn: Recipients must be valid email addresses, one per line or comma-separated
title: Title
validationNotificationTeamsHostInvalid: Webhook URL must be a valid Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL
validationNotificationGenericWebhookUrlI: Webhook URL must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL
validationNotificationShoutrrrUrlInvalid: Shoutrrr URL must be a valid URL with a service scheme
validationNotificationWebhookHeadersInva: Headers must be one per line in Name: value format

validationProviderNameMaxLength: Name must be at most 100 characters
validationIssuerUrlInvalid: Issuer URL must be a valid URL
validationRepositoryUrlInvalid: Repository URL must be a valid URL
validationAuthTokenMaxLength: Auth token must be at most 1024 characters
selectProviderDescription: Select the Git provider for this repository.
repositoryConnectionDescription: Enter the repository URL and an auth token.
syncTypeDescription: Decide how OrcaCD should check for updates in this repository.
syncTypeWebhookDescription: Real-time updates with minimal resource usage.
syncTypePollingDescription: Periodic checks for updates. May have a delay.
repositoryConnectedDescription: The repository has been successfully connected.
repositoryNoFurtherAction: No further action is needed. OrcaCD will start syncing with the repository shortly.
repositoryWebhookSetupDescription: Set up a webhook in your repository to enable real-time updates:
saveSecretNow: Save this secret now - it won't be shown again.
failedConnectRepository: Failed to connect to repository. Please check the URL and auth token.
editUserDescription: Update user details and permissions. Optionally reset the password.
addUserDescription: Create a new local user account. A temporary password will be generated.
resetPasswordDescription: Generate a new password and require the user to change it after sign-in.

deleteUserDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" ({email}). This action cannot be undone.
loginWallpaperAlt: Orca swimming away from shore by Lachlan Gowen on Unsplash
oidcErrorAccessDenied: Sign-in was canceled or denied by your identity provider.
oidcErrorInvalidCallback: The authentication callback was invalid. Please try again.
oidcErrorMissingState: The sign-in session expired. Please start sign-in again.
oidcErrorProviderNotFound: The selected identity provider is unavailable.
oidcErrorEmailNotVerified: Your identity provider did not confirm a verified email address.
oidcErrorSignupDisabled: Automatic account creation is disabled for this provider.
oidcErrorInternalError: A server error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
oidcErrorAccountCreationFailed: Your account could not be created. Please contact an administrator.
oidcErrorAccountLinkingFailed: Your account could not be linked. Please contact an administrator.
oidcErrorAccountUpdateFailed: Your account could not be updated. Please contact an administrator.
oidcErrorProviderEmailConflict: Another account is already linked to this identity provider with the same email. Please contact an administrator.
oidcErrorTokenGenerationFailed: Sign-in failed while creating your session. Please try again.
validationNameMinLength: Name must be at least 3 characters
validationNameMaxLength: Name must be at most 64 characters
validationPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters
validationPasswordMaxLength: Password must be at most 128 characters
validationPasswordMissingUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validationPasswordMissingLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validationPasswordMissingNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validationPasswordMissingSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character

name: Name
chooseAuthMethod: Choose how you'd like to sign in
noLoginMethodsAvailable: No login methods are currently available. Please contact your administrator.
editRepositoryAuthDescription: Update the authentication token for this repository.
editRepositorySyncDescription: Change how OrcaCD syncs with this repository.
validationPollingIntervalMin: Polling interval must be at least 60 seconds
validationPollingIntervalMax: Polling interval must be at most 86400 seconds
repositorySyncUpdatedDescription: The sync settings have been successfully updated.
imagePollEnabledDescription: Automatically check for new image versions and redeploy when updates are detected
imagePollIntervalHint: Minimum 60 s. How often to check the registry for new image versions.
imagePollDeleteOldImagesDescription: Remove replaced image versions after a successful update
validationImagePollIntervalMin: Polling interval must be at least 60 seconds
imagePullWebhookDescription: Trigger an image pull when a container image is pushed to your registry. Supports Docker Hub, Harbor, GitHub Container Registry, and any generic registry. For Docker Hub, append ?token=<secret> to the webhook URL instead of using an Authorization header.
imagePullWebhookSecretModalDescription: Copy the secret now — it will not be shown again. Send it as Authorization: Bearer <secret>, or for Docker Hub append ?token=<secret> to the webhook URL.
revokeWebhookConfirmDescription: This will immediately invalidate the current webhook secret. Any existing integrations using the old secret will stop working.
githubActionsOIDCEnabledTooltip: Allows GitHub Actions to trigger deployments using OIDC authentication without storing credentials
